Description: Returns records with matching values in both tables.
Returns all records from the left table and matched from the right.
Result: Left table stays whole; right may have NULLs.

Description: Returns all records from the right table and matched from the left.
Result: Right table stays whole; left may have NULLs.

Description: Returns all records when there is a match in either table.
Returns the Cartesian product of both tables.
Result: Every row in A matched with every row in B.
